content_body: What a glorious time we had at your lovely home! This has been a retreat and reunion of hearts and souls of four high school friends with spouses and with our Bible Study leader from 36 years ago. Our prayer service around the fireplace was so inspiring. We hope to return again – love the views, the Toccoa River, the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway passing and the awesome beds and linens! God bless you and thanks for such a nice abode!
title: What a Nice Abode!
